SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.view.manager

Class CommonUIManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.view.manager.CommonUIManager
public class CommonUIManager extends Object
Manages UI components shared across all game modes.
Author:
Dong, Jia

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CommonUIManager()
    Constructor for testing purposes with null components.
